evals.prompt: Give me a sketch explainer for how JWT authentication works
evals.expected_output: A structured diagram spec with 3-5 swim lanes (e.g. CLIENT, TOKEN, SERVER VERIFICATION, CLAIMS/PAYLOAD, EXPIRY) plus an AI image prompt in the Excalidraw whiteboard style with pastel colors and pill boxes.

assertions.name: has-both-output-sections
assertions.description: Output contains both a Diagram Spec section and an AI Image Prompt section (or clearly labeled equivalents)

assertions.name: has-3-to-6-lanes
assertions.description: The diagram spec contains between 3 and 6 swim lanes

assertions.name: lanes-use-bold-uppercase-labels
assertions.description: Each swim lane has a bold uppercase label of 4 words or fewer

assertions.name: jwt-concepts-present
assertions.description: JWT-specific concepts appear in the spec: at minimum token, claims or payload, and signature or verify

assertions.name: ai-prompt-has-style-keywords
assertions.description: The AI image prompt contains at least 3 of: Excalidraw, Virgil, swim lanes, pastel, pill boxes, whiteboard

assertions.name: boxes-have-emoji
assertions.description: Concept boxes in the diagram spec each include an emoji icon alongside the label

evals.prompt: Can you make a whiteboard-style diagram explaining how photosynthesis works?
evals.expected_output: A structured diagram spec with 3-5 swim lanes organized as phases or components (e.g. SUNLIGHT INPUT, CHLOROPLAST, LIGHT REACTIONS, CALVIN CYCLE, OUTPUTS) plus an AI image prompt matching the Excalidraw sketch style.

assertions.name: has-both-output-sections
assertions.description: Output contains both a Diagram Spec section and an AI Image Prompt section

assertions.name: has-3-to-6-lanes
assertions.description: The diagram spec contains between 3 and 6 swim lanes

assertions.name: photosynthesis-concepts-present
assertions.description: Core photosynthesis concepts appear: at minimum sunlight or light, chloroplast or chlorophyll, glucose or sugar, and oxygen

assertions.name: lanes-phase-based-not-layer-based
assertions.description: Lanes are organized as phases or processes (e.g. light input → reaction → output) rather than system layers, reflecting the non-technical classification

assertions.name: ai-prompt-has-style-keywords
assertions.description: The AI image prompt contains at least 3 of: Excalidraw, Virgil, swim lanes, pastel, pill boxes, whiteboard

assertions.name: boxes-have-emoji
assertions.description: Concept boxes in the diagram spec each include an emoji icon

evals.prompt: Sketch explainer: how does a startup raise a Series A?
evals.expected_output: A structured diagram spec with 3-5 swim lanes organized as phases or stakeholders (e.g. FOUNDERS, TRACTION, PITCH, TERM SHEET, CLOSE) plus an AI image prompt in the whiteboard sketch style.

assertions.name: has-both-output-sections
assertions.description: Output contains both a Diagram Spec section and an AI Image Prompt section

assertions.name: has-3-to-6-lanes
assertions.description: The diagram spec contains between 3 and 6 swim lanes

assertions.name: startup-concepts-present
assertions.description: Startup fundraising concepts appear: at minimum traction or metrics, pitch or deck, and term sheet or investors or VCs

assertions.name: ai-prompt-has-style-keywords
assertions.description: The AI image prompt contains at least 3 of: Excalidraw, Virgil, swim lanes, pastel, pill boxes, whiteboard

assertions.name: boxes-have-emoji
assertions.description: Concept boxes in the diagram spec each include an emoji icon
